title: The Punjab Municipal Corporation Law (Extension to Chandigarh) Act, 1994
full_text: The Punjab Municipal Corporation Law (Extension to Chandigarh) Act, 1994 पंजाब नगर निगम विधि (चंडीगढ़ परविस्‍तारण) अधिनियम, 1994 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 199445 Act Number: 45 Enactment Date: 1994-07-22 Act Year: 1994 Short Title: The Punjab Municipal Corporation Law (Extension to Chandigarh) Act, 1994 Hindi Title: पंजाब नगर निगम विधि (चंडीगढ़ परविस्‍तारण) अधिनियम, 1994 Long Title: An Act to provide for the extension of the Punjab Municipal Corporation Act, 1976 to the Union territory of Chandigarh. Ministry: Ministry of Home Affairs Department: Department of States Enforcement Date: 24-05-1994 Schedule 1. THE SCHEDULE Order Appendix Forms TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Punjab Municipal Corporation Law (Extension to Chandigarh) Act, 1994 Show all section Section 1. Short title and commencement. Section 2. Extension and amendments of Punjab Act 42 of 1976. Section 3. Repeal of Punjab Act III of 1911 and savings. Section 4. Transitory provision. Section 5. Repeal of Ordinance 7 of 1994 and saving. Schedule 1.
